economy.title: ECB Must Act If Iran War Threatens Price Stability, Nagel Says
economy.description: The European Central Bank will continue analyzing the economy before deciding next month whether to raise interest rates, but policymakers must take action if the Iran war jeopardizes price stability, according to Governing Council member Joachim Nagel.
